expectations.text: Response lists at least 3 specific tool names with a 'notion_' prefix
expectations.evidence: Lists notion_list_databases, notion_query_database, notion_create_page as Tool 1/2/3 headings

expectations.text: Response recommends TypeScript as the implementation language
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows 'npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk @notionhq/client zod' and mentions Node.js 18+

expectations.text: Response mentions Zod for input schema validation
expectations.evidence: Zod appears in the npm install command: 'npm install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk @notionhq/client zod'

expectations.text: Response mentions using an environment variable for the Notion API key
expectations.evidence: Claude Desktop config shows: env: { NOTION_API_KEY: 'secret_your_token_here' }

expectations.text: Response includes tool annotations (readOnlyHint, destructiveHint, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Tools are listed as headings only (Tool 1: notion_list_databases - Lists all accessible databases). No annotation objects shown in tool definitions.

expectations.text: Response mentions the MCP Inspector or some testing approach
expectations.evidence: Response goes straight from setup to Claude Desktop configuration with no testing step or mention of MCP Inspector
